prompt: Create a realistic flash-photography portrait of an adult woman in a glossy silver-and-white maid cosplay outfit, standing in a modern high-rise apartment kitchenette at night. She wears a white ruffled maid headband with black ribbon accents, dark shoulder-length wavy hair, a shiny metallic silver bodice with white ruffled trim, a sheer white apron, a white choker, and long ribbon ties hanging at the sides. She holds an empty round silver serving tray with both hands at chest height, angled slightly toward the camera. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered rectangular pixelated privacy blur in muted brown tones. The setting includes a dark granite countertop, sink and faucet, dark wood lower cabinets, a white wall with a light switch on the right, and large floor-to-ceiling windows showing a nighttime city skyline with scattered lights. Use a vertical smartphone snapshot composition, slightly wide-angle perspective from above chest level, direct on-camera flash, high detail, realistic skin and fabric reflections, intimate indoor party/cosplay photo mood. Customize the outfit as glossy silver and white, the setting as modern high-rise apartment kitchenette at night, the prop as empty round silver serving tray, the privacy treatment as centered rectangular pixelated privacy blur, and the lighting style as direct on-camera flash smartphone photo. Ensure the subject is clearly an adult, keep the pose non-explicit, include exactly one person and one tray, and do not add extra text or watermarks.
